name: qa_manager_supabase_family_probe_download_or_run_error_rules_on_instances
desc: QA Manager ↔ Supabase bridge. Three modes. mode=list: probe the Supabase families bucket for a category + fuzzy candidates (no Revit mutation). mode=download: fetch the .rfa into the persistent %APPDATA% family cache. mode=run_rules_on_loaded_family: run every relevant Error Manager rule against instances of the family already in the model and return a pass/fail matrix scoped to that family.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: One of: list, download, run_rules_on_loaded_family. Default: list.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Supabase family category (e.g. '52 Drainage', '65 Mechanical Power'). Required for list/download.

parameters.name: family_name
parameters.description: The family to target (case-sensitive RFA name without extension). Required for download/run_rules_on_loaded_family.

parameters.name: rule_group
parameters.description: Optional navigator group filter (Coordination/Checking/Mechanical/Electrical) for run_rules_on_loaded_family mode.

keywords: run error rules on family instances
